question_metadata.board_relevance_reason: High-frequency topic. Analysis of 2024-25 PYQs shows a dominance of 'Event Organisation' notices (Debates, Treks, Camps) in Set 1, 2, and 3.

board_style_question: You are Rakesh/Riya, Secretary of the Literary Society, St. Karen’s High School, Patna. Your school is organising an Inter-School Debate Competition for students of classes XI and XII. Draft a notice in about 50 words to be put up on the school notice board, inviting entries from interested students. Include all necessary details like date, time, venue, and topic.

mandatory_components: Name and Designation of Issuer (Left Aligned)

brainstorm_points: Date/Time: Need a future date (e.g., 2 weeks from now)
Call to Action: Register with undersigned by [Deadline]
planning_framework.logical_flow_model: Target Group -> Event Name -> Date/Time/Venue -> Topic -> Deadline for names
planning_framework.time_allocation_minutes: Planning: 2 min | Writing: 3 min | Review: 2 min

model_answer_with_word_count.answer_text:
ST. KAREN’S HIGH SCHOOL, PATNA
NOTICE

12th February, 2026

INTER-SCHOOL DEBATE COMPETITION

The Literary Society is organising an Inter-School Debate on 25th February, 2026 at 10:00 AM in the School Auditorium. The topic is "Artificial Intelligence: Boon or Bane". Students of classes XI-XII interested in participating must submit their names to the undersigned by 18th February for the selection round.

Rakesh
Secretary, Literary Society

why_this_scores_full_marks.format_compliance_reason: Strict adherence to the box format and correct sequence (Org Name -> Notice -> Date -> Heading -> Body -> Sign). Date is in expanded format.
why_this_scores_full_marks.content_strength_reason: Answers all 5 Ws (Who, What, Where, When, Whom to contact) without exceeding the word limit.
why_this_scores_full_marks.expression_quality_reason: Uses formal, objective tone ('This is to inform' / 'The Literary Society is organising'). No personal pronouns like 'I' or 'We' used unnecessarily.

basic_to_board_level_examples.board_level: The Literary Society is organizing an...
Submit their names to the undersigned...

sentence_transformation_examples: Weak: You can participate if you want. -> Strong: Interested students may register...
Weak: The debate is on 25th Feb. -> Strong: ...is scheduled for 25th February, 2026.

common_mark_losing_mistakes: Forgetting to draw the BOX (Instant 0.5 - 1 mark deduction).
Writing the date as '12/02/2026' instead of '12th February, 2026'.
Using first-person pronouns like 'I am writing this notice'. Notices are third-person.
Missing the designation/authority at the bottom.
examiner_psychology_insights: Examiners check the BOX first. No box = immediate negative impression.
They count the 'Value Points': Date, Time, Venue, Deadline. If one is missing, marks are cut.
They prefer the body to start directly (e.g., 'This is to inform...' or 'The Literary Society is organising...').
Neatness matters. Overwriting or scratching out text looks unprofessional.
self_evaluation_checklist: Is the word 'NOTICE' in the center and capitalized?
Is the date on the left?
Did I include Date, Time, Venue, and Whom to contact?
Is the designation written below the name?
